- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:3:   Parses a subset of Markdown into structured category/item data.
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:7:   * `## Heading` lines define category names (H2 only).
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:8:   * Bullet items beneath a heading follow the format:
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:9:     `- **Item Name**: description (tag1, tag2)`
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:10:   * Tags are optional; an item with no parentheses receives `tags: []`.
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:11:   * All other lines (blank lines, non-matching bullets, H1/H3+ headings,
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:12:     nested list items starting with more than one `-`) are silently ignored.
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:13:   * Bullet items that appear before the first `## heading` are discarded.
- missing from embed  tasks/036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser_01/solution.ex:17:   # Compiled regexes (module-level constants)

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser/prompt.md:39: Specific behaviours to implement:

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser/prompt.md:40: - A `##` heading with no valid bullet items beneath it (before the next heading) should still appear in the output with `items: []`
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser/prompt.md:41: - Items with no tag parentheses should have `tags: []`
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser/prompt.md:42: - Tags should be trimmed of whitespace individually

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser/prompt.md:43: - Only `##` (H2) headings define categories — `#`, `###`, and deeper headings should be ignored entirely (treated as unrecognised lines)
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser/prompt.md:44: - If the document has bullet items before any `##` heading appears, discard them
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_001_markdown_to_structured_data_parser/prompt.md:45: - The function must handle an empty string input, returning `[]`
